name: Jim Slaight
summary: Former U.S. Navy weapons-systems officer who participated in the 2004 Nimitz interception.
profileSummary: Former U.S. Navy weapons-systems officer who participated in the 2004 Nimitz interception.
background: Former U.S. Navy weapons-systems officer in the aircraft flown by Alex Dietrich.
inclusionNote: Included to represent the full aircrew involved in the visual interception and strengthen the firsthand witness record.
